artifacts.purpose: validator fixture — tones (220Hz, 330Hz) + 2Hz drum-like clicks. Committed from Track A validator session.

runtime.coreml_explanation: Manifest declares coreml_ep_supported=false for all 8 models. sf_demucs.hpp:145 gates CoreML append on that flag, so only CPU EP was used. CoreML EP was NOT attempted at runtime. Future work: flip manifest flag + re-probe residency with ORT VERBOSE logs.
